heading: Community
subheading: At our core, we value inclusivity, thoughtfulness, and respect. We've built a space where mahjong pros can chase Thirteen Orphans and newcomers can learn the game without feeling intimidated. For us, mahjong is more than just tiles. It's a reason for us to actually get together in person and connect. We're here to build a welcoming and special community where members can make lifelong connections and keep this game and its culture thriving for generations to come. —Jorge Yau, Founder of Lucky Cat Mahjong

events.name: Summer Social Night
events.description: Our biggest open community night of the season — new faces, old friends, and plenty of tiles on the table.

events.name: Spring Invitational
events.description: An exclusive tournament celebrating our most active club members at a special Brooklyn venue.

events.name: April Beginner Workshop
events.description: A hands-on intro to Hong Kong mahjong — tiles, melds, and scoring basics for first-time players.
